data.title: Sanofi/Teva Unveil New Detailed Data For Duvakitug Study Supporting Overall Efficacy For Common Inflammatory Bowel Disease
data.description: Teva and Sanofi's duvakitug showed promising results in a Phase 2b study for ulcerative colitis and Crohn's disease, with plans for a Phase 3 trial in 2025.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From ONEOK Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
Fresh Del Monte Stock Falls As Q4 Sales & Earnings Miss Expectations
data.description: Fresh Del Monte Produce reported slight sales growth of 0.4% in Q4, totaling $1.01 billion, underperforming analyst expectations. Gross profit increased by nearly 10%, but adjusted EPS of $0.26 missed the consensus estimate.

data.title: AAC Technologies' Big Comeback Already Priced Into Stock?
data.description: Shares of Hong Kong-listed AAC Technologies are up 180% in the past year, but its outlook for a profit surge fails to impress investors.

data.title: Penny Stock Co-Diagnostics Withdraws FDA Application For COVID-19 Test, Plans To Submit Enhanced Version
data.description: Co-Diagnostics plans to submit an enhanced COVID-19 test for FDA clearance, addressing stability concerns and integrating platform advancements.
